spawnRegistry.description: Tracks parent-child pattern lineage. When a parent pattern sheds a sub-signal into a new pattern, both are recorded here.

spawns.reason: GitHub artifact sharing sub-signal matured into independent socialization pattern
Customer-facing enablement layer distinct from eval schema/framework scaffolding
Signal-to-synthesis-to-artifact loop distinct from routing/dedup decisions
Eval-specific scoping questions separated from general platform Q&A
Loop/PPT pipeline sub-workflow matured into standalone pattern

candidateSkills.name: meeting-notes-action-extractor
candidateSkills.description: Ingests meeting transcript, agenda, or Loop doc and emits structured action items with owner/due-date, decisions log, follow-up email draft, and ADO task stubs. Chain head for transcript-to-loop and post-meeting-external-followup downstream. 331 occurrences across 28 unbroken cycles.
triggerExamples: Extract action items from today's Camp AIR standup and update the Loop doc
Summarize external customer meeting into Loop page with owners
Create standardized 1:1 notes template for all recurring meetings
Generate post-meeting recap broadcast from CAPE Architecture Call
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Replaces ~60.20 hrs across 4 roles. 331 occ over 28 cycles. Chain head for 2 downstream patterns. Est. ~$156,520/yr.

candidateSkills.name: eval-report-synthesizer
candidateSkills.description: Ingests eval results, strategy discussions, actionability brainstorms, and customer donated evals. Produces standardized reports with gap analysis. RISING trend. 426 occurrences, 5 participants. Highest value score in catalog (95).
triggerExamples: Synthesize eval progress from CAPE leadership threads and customer donated evals discussion
Generate eval strategy and actionability analysis from Deep Technical Working Session notes
Prepare Golden Evals kickoff report from meeting transcript
Create eval strategy overview merging Teams threads and meeting artifacts
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Saves ~106.89 hrs across 5 roles. Highest value (95). RISING. Est. ~$277,914/yr.

candidateSkills.name: ado-notification-router
candidateSkills.description: Classifies ADO notification emails by work-item type, workstream prefix, and urgency. Routes action-required to correct role; auto-archives FYI. DEEP SATURATION at 833 occ. Highest automation score (95).
triggerExamples: Triage my ADO inbox — what needs action vs FYI?
Classify ADO notifications by workstream: IcM vs coverage vs AI Eval
Which Bug/Requirement notifications require PM response before EOD?
Route this Task notification to the correct DRI based on workstream prefix
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Eliminates ~30.34 hrs. 833 occ SATURATED at 40/week. Highest automation (95). Est. ~$78,884/yr.

candidateSkills.name: eval-design-advisor
candidateSkills.description: Codifies eval expert knowledge for scoping, edge-case guidance, and tooling mechanics. BSI 87 CRITICAL — PM sole DRI for 8+ request types. RISING with strongest intake ever (15/cycle consecutive). Unblocks expert scaling bottleneck.
triggerExamples: How many evals should I create for a 3-intent Copilot Studio agent?
What is the difference between keyword match and semantic eval grading?
Guide eval design for actionability assessment framework
Explain golden eval methodology for BizChat offline evaluation
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Unblocks BSI 87 CRITICAL bottleneck. 213 occ. 8+ request types codifiable. Est. ~$129,584/yr.

candidateSkills.name: weekly-status-report-generator
candidateSkills.description: Generates standardized weekly status reports from Loop docs, Teams threads, email updates, meeting notes. Resolves 5-format parallel creation gap. RISING trend.
triggerExamples: Generate this week's CAPE eval status merging all sources
Draft unified XFN Report Out from parallel Teams posts this week
Create EOD debrief template for Camp AIR daily standup follow-up
Refresh weekly status from Loop doc, Teams, and email summaries
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Saves ~42.64 hrs across 4 roles. 147 occ RISING. 5 parallel formats. Est. ~$110,864/yr.
